scripts.build: npm run types && tsc --noEmit && vite build
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler deploy && npm run db:migrate:remote

ADMIN_PASSWORD_BOOTSTRAP.description: Optional legacy bootstrap password. Leave blank for normal installs; Emailfox will create the first admin from the web setup screen.

CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN.description: Cloudflare API token used for inventory sync and Email Routing rule management. Recommended scopes: Account Read, Zone Read, Email Routing Read/Edit, Email Sending Read, Workers Scripts Read.

MANAGEMENT_HOST.description: Optional custom dashboard hostname. Leave blank for the generated workers.dev URL; set it later if you add a custom domain such as mail.example.com.

CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID.description: Optional Cloudflare account id. Leave blank if your API token can access exactly one Cloudflare account.

PASSWORD_RESET_FROM.description: Optional verified sender address for password reset emails. If blank, Emailfox uses the admin email address.
